headline: Starbucks (SBUX) Introduces Worker Bonuses And Weekly Pay In Frontline Overhaul
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) is rolling out a new bonus program and pay structure for cafe workers. The package includes quarterly cash bonuses tied to store performance. Workers gain expanded tipping options and a move to weekly pay cycles. The company indicates these changes could lift hourly pay by roughly 5% to 8%. For investors tracking Starbucks, this pay overhaul sits at the intersection of operations, labor relations, and brand strength. The company runs a large global cafe network...
